backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing analysis storage with user-specific history, settings management (theme, AI sensitivity, timeframe, notifications, language), and blob storage mixin for handling chart images.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two features: updating API integration documentation with 6-step technical analysis requirements and extending TypeScript interfaces to support scoring system with COMPRA/VENDA/NEUTRO/SEM ENTRADA signals.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components, pages, hooks, and utilities describing Portuguese localization, four signal types support, API integration, and UI functionality.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining light and dark theme color schemes using oklch color space for consistent theming across the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with viewport meta tag and root div mounting point, titled 'Advance Signal Pro'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with six routes (dashboard, analyze, processing, results, history, settings) wrapped in ThemeProvider for global theme management.
frontend/src/components/CameraCapture.ts: Camera capture component with Portuguese UI text, supporting photo capture, retake functionality, camera switching, and comprehensive error handling for permissions and device support.
frontend/src/components/ChartOverlay.tsx: Canvas-based overlay component that draws support/resistance levels as dashed lines and directional trend arrows (bullish/bearish) on top of uploaded chart images.
frontend/src/components/FileUpload.tsx: File upload component with drag-and-drop support that validates image/PDF files (max 10MB) and displays selected file info with a clear button.
Displays a clickable history card for a single analysis result, showing signal type (COMPRA/VENDA/SEM ENTRADA), confidence percentage, trend direction, and timestamp.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a main content area, toast notifications, and a footer with attribution to caffeine.ai.
Visual indicator component for multi-step processing that shows active, complete, or pending states with icons (spinner, checkmark, or dot).
frontend/src/components/SettingRow.tsx: Reusable settings row component that displays a label, description, and control element (like a switch or input) in a horizontal layout.
frontend/src/components/SignalCard.tsx: Displays the main trading signal analysis result with direction (COMPRA/VENDA/NEUTRO/SEM ENTRADA), confidence percentage, trend strength, and optional score badge.
frontend/src/config/apiConfig.ts: Defines AI provider configurations (OpenAI, Gemini, Python, Custom) with endpoints and headers, plus detailed technical analysis requirements documentation for external APIs.
frontend/src/context/ThemeContext.tsx: React context provider for managing light/dark theme state with localStorage persistence and document class application.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using Internet Identity, with automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipboard.ts: Custom hook that listens for paste events to capture images from the clipboard and handles permission errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating chart analyses and user settings, using the backend actor and handling query invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useSettings.ts: Wraps useGetSettings and useUpdateSettings queries into a simplified hook that exposes settings data, loading state, and an update function.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, base styles for typography and form elements, and utility classes for touch targets.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the root component wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider for state management and authentication.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyzeChart.tsx: Page component for uploading or capturing chart images via file upload, camera, or clipboard, then navigating to processing screen with the selected image stored in sessionStorage.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying app branding, AI status indicator, and navigation buttons to analyze charts, view history, and access settings with feature highlights.
frontend/src/pages/History.tsx: Displays a list of past chart analyses fetched via useGetAnalyses hook, showing loading state, empty state, or a list of HistoryListItem components.
frontend/src/pages/ProcessingScreen.tsx: Handles chart image processing by animating through stages, calling external analysis API, mapping the response to internal format, storing results in backend, and navigating to results page.
frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx: Results page component that displays trading signal analysis with confidence levels, trend indicators, detected patterns, and special handling for 'SEM ENTRADA' (no clear signal) and 'NEUTRO' (neutral) cases. Includes share and save functionality.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page component allowing users to configure theme (light/dark), AI sensitivity slider, default timeframe selection, and signal notification preferences using a settings hook.
frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts: API service for sending chart images to external AI analysis endpoint with retry logic, timeout handling, and progress tracking. Enforces objective rule-based analysis methodology and expects 'SEM ENTRADA' for unclear signals.
frontend/src/types/apiTypes.ts: TypeScript type definitions for external API responses, documenting the required 6-step objective rule-based technical analysis process with signal scoring system and mandatory return structure.
frontend/src/utils/formatTimestamp.ts: Utility function that converts bigint nanosecond timestamps to human-readable Portuguese date/time strings (e.g., '15 de Jan de 2024 às 14:30').
frontend/src/utils/mapApiResponse.ts: Maps external API analysis responses to internal AnalysisResult format, converting Portuguese signal/trend strings to enums, pattern names to CandlestickPattern types, and preserving original signal values for UI display.
frontend/src/utils/shareAnalysis.ts: Utility for sharing analysis results using native Web Share API when available, with fallback to clipboard copy for unsupported browsers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions for colors (using OKLCH), spacing, shadows, animations, and container settings, plus typography and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Project state file defining Advance Signal Pro, a mobile app for automated financial chart analysis using external AI REST API, targeting Pocket Option binary options trading with M1/M5/M10 timeframes. Tracks 10 implemented features including dashboard, chart upload, AI processing animation, results display, history, settings, theme support, Portuguese localization, timeframe selection, and external API integration.
